title: ICT Division Fellowship
desc: Research funding for NavA11y / M.Sc. thesis (Grant No. 56.00.0000.052.33.002.24-61)
description: Awarded the ICT Division Fellowship by the Government of Bangladesh to support research on NavA11y — an accessibility-focused navigation assistant developed as part of my M.Sc. thesis in Software Engineering at the University of Dhaka.

sections.body: The ICT Division Fellowship is a competitive national grant issued by the Ministry of Posts, Telecommunications and Information Technology of Bangladesh. It funds promising graduate research in technology and software engineering.

The grant supports my M.Sc. thesis work on NavA11y, a system aimed at improving web accessibility through intelligent navigation assistance. The research involves controlled user studies, accessibility audits, and browser-based instrumentation.

title: Top 6 — ICSE SCORE 2023
description: Placed in the Top 6 at ICSE SCORE 2023 — the Student Research Competition and Expo at the International Conference on Software Engineering, one of the most prestigious undergraduate SE research venues globally.

sections.body: ICSE SCORE is the student research competition held at the International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE). It invites undergraduate students to present original research to a panel of expert judges from academia and industry.

Our submission presented original software engineering research conducted during our undergraduate program. Competing against teams from universities worldwide, we advanced to the final round and placed in the top 6.

title: Champion — Refactoring Competition
desc: First place in a competitive code refactoring challenge
description: Won first place in a competitive refactoring challenge, demonstrating ability to improve code quality, readability, and maintainability under time constraints.

sections.body: Competitors were given a legacy codebase and tasked with refactoring it for improved structure, readability, and adherence to software engineering principles — without breaking existing functionality.

title: Best UI/UX — BUET Hackathon
desc: Best UI/UX award at the BUET Hackathon
description: Awarded Best UI/UX at the BUET Hackathon 2023 for delivering a polished, accessible, and intuitive user interface under hackathon time constraints.

sections.body: The BUET Hackathon brought together teams from top Bangladeshi universities to build functional products in a compressed timeframe. Our team was recognized for the quality and thoughtfulness of the user experience we delivered.

title: Champion — Project Showcasing
desc: First place at departmental project showcasing event
description: Won first place at the departmental project showcasing event in 2022, presenting an original software project to a panel of faculty judges.

title: Runners-up — Project Showcasing
desc: Second place at departmental project showcasing event
description: Placed second at the departmental project showcasing event in 2021.

title: LeetCode Practice
desc: Practice problems regularly — focus on problem-solving patterns, not competitive rankings.
description: Regular practice on LeetCode focusing on algorithmic thinking and problem-solving patterns. Not competitive programming — just keeping the problem-solving muscles sharp.
